zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Knyvett於大約1410年出生在英國時，他的父親Sir John Knyvett16歲，母親Elizabeth de Clifton19歲。他於大約1460年與Alice de Grey結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1515年12月2日在他的家鄉享年106歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可維蒙達哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Knyvett于大约1410年出生在英国时，他的父亲Sir John Knyvett16岁，母亲Elizabeth de Clifton19岁。他于大约1460年与Alice de Grey结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1515年12月2日在他的家乡享年106岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可維蒙達哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Knyvett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Knivett
meanings: English: from a Norman French pronunciation of Knight , resulting from the Norman French difficulty with the h of Old English cniht.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Knyvett was born about 1410, in England, his father, Sir John Knyvett, was 16 and his mother, Elizabeth de Clifton, was 19. He married Alice de Grey about 1460. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 2 December 1515, in his hometown, at the age of 106, and was buried in Wymondham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Knyvett est né environ 1410, à Angleterre, son père, Sir John Knyvett, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Clifton, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Grey environ 1460. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 2 décembre 1515, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 106 ans, et a été enterré à Wymondham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Knyvett um 1410 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Knyvett 16 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Clifton 19. Er hat um 1460 Alice de Grey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 2. Dezember 1515 im Alter von 106 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Wymondham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Knyvett è nato il circa 1410 nel England, il suo padre, Sir John Knyvett, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Clifton, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Grey circa 1460. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 2 dicembre 1515, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 106 anni, e fu sepolto a Wymondham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Knyvettが約1410年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir John Knyvettは16歳，母Elizabeth de Cliftonは19歳であった。約1460年にAlice de Greyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1515年12月2日に故郷で106歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクウイモンドハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Knyvett(이)가 대략 1410년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Knyvett(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Clifton(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1460년 Alice de Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1515년 12월 2일 그의 고향에서 106세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 윈이몽함에 묻혔다.

mn.Buckenham, Norfolk, England: Buckenham, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Southwick Northampton, england: Southwick, North Hamtunscire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Knyvett nasceu aproximadamente 1410, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Knyvett, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Clifton, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de Grey aproximadamente 1460. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 2 de dezembro de 1515, em sua cidade natal, com 106 anos, e foi sepultado em Wymondham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Knyvett родился около 1410 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Knyvett было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Clifton, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Grey около 1460 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 2 декабря 1515 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 106 лет и был похоронен в местности вимондхам, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Knyvett nació aproximadamente 1410, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Knyvett, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Clifton, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Alice de Grey aproximadamente 1460. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 2 de diciembre de 1515, en su pueblo, a la edad de 106 años, y fue sepultado en Wymondham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
